metadata.title: Life At The Cost Of All
metadata.artist: And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun
tracklist: 01 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - ...And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun
02 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - Be Envious Of The Maggots For They Cannot Comprehend What The World Has Become
03 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - Once We Tried And Once We Failed
04 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - Our Nothing
05 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - They Walk Forever In Search Of
06 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - We Pray What's Left Of Our Ocean Will Someday Take Us
07 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - We Will Carry This Failure Forever, It Will Never Come To Pass
